steps.t: Dréri has asked you to look around the nearby area for firewood. You should collect fallen branches near Fellgát.
Now that you have some firewood, you should build camp-fires in Fellgát.
The camp-fires in Fellgát have been assembled, but now they need to be set alight.
The camp-fires have been lit, protecting Fellgát from the chill of the mountains. You should talk to Dréri.
